description_long: This is a two-tiered round cake with a thick layer of white icing covering both tiers. The top surface of each tier is decorated with evenly spaced, small red dollops, likely made of icing or fondant, adding a festive touch. The sides of the lower tier are brown, suggesting either a chocolate exterior or a visible cake layer beneath the icing. Two upright candles, pale yellow in color, are placed on the top tier, indicating the cake is prepared for a celebration. The surface of the icing is slightly textured, with some colorful sprinkles or shimmer visible, giving it a lively appearance. The cake sits directly on a flat surface with no visible plate or stand.
description: A two-tiered round cake with white icing, red decorations, and two candles on top, featuring a brown lower tier and colorful sprinkles.
description_view_0: Front view showing both candles upright and the red decorations evenly spaced on the white icing.
description_view_1: Side view with only one candle visible due to the angle, highlighting the brown lower tier and the red decorations.
description_view_2: Rear view with both candles visible, similar to the front but from the opposite side, showing the cake's symmetry.
description_view_3: Side view with one candle visible, focusing on the smooth white icing and the brown lower tier.
